ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rides" (
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the ride */,
  "pickup_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the pickup location */,
  "pickup_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the pickup location */,
  "dropoff_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the drop-off location */,
  "dropoff_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the drop-off location */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fleet the ride belongs to */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver who took the ride */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle used for the ride */,
  "ride_type" TEXT /* Type of the ride (e.g., day, night, peak hour) */,
  "ride_distance" REAL /* Distance of the ride */,
  "ride_duration" REAL /* Duration of the ride */,
  "fare_amount" REAL /* Fare amount for the ride */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_id") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rides_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleets" (
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet */,
  "fleet_name" TEXT /* Name of the fleet */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the fleet */,
  "fleet_type" TEXT /* Type of the fleet (e.g., standard, luxury) */,
  "fleet_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of vehicles in the fleet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Full name of the driver */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "driver_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the driver */,
  "driver_experience" INTEGER /* Years of driving experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of the vehicle (e.g., sedan, SUV) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle (e.g., good, average) */,
  "vehicle_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of passengers the vehicle can hold */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the request */,
  "pickup_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the pickup location */,
  "pickup_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the pickup location */,
  "dropoff_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the drop-off location */,
  "dropoff_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the drop-off location */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Time when the request was made */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of the request (e.g., standard, luxury) */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Any special requests from the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the user */,
  "ride_history" TEXT /* History of rides taken by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "driver_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "availability_status" TEXT /* Availability status of the driver (e.g., available, unavailable) */,
  "availability_time" TEXT /* Time when the availability was updated */,
  "location_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the driver's current location */,
  "location_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the driver's current location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_driver_availability_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the ride */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride */,
  "ride_time" TEXT /* Time when the ride was taken */,
  "ride_rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user for the ride */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_history_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the ride */,
  "payment_time" TEXT /* Time when the payment was made */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_ride_id FOREIGN KEY ("ride_id") REFERENCES rides ("ride_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is eligible for the discount */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of the discount */,
  "discount_type" TEXT /* Type of the discount (e.g., percentage, fixed amount) */,
  "discount_expiration" TEXT /* Date when the discount expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleet_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fleet manager */,
  "fleet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fleet the manager is responsible for */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the fleet manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fleet manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the fleet manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleet_managers_fleet_id FOREIGN KEY ("fleet_id") REFERENCES fleets ("fleet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was performed */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., oil change, tire rotation) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
